children.heading: .—Provision of Assistance
children.label: a .—Provision of Assistance
children.text: In the case of a disabled individual who is described in subsection (a)(2) or (b)(2) of and who is residing, but does not intend to permanently reside, in a residence owned by a member of such individual’s family, the Secretary may assist the individual in acquiring such adaptations to such residence as are determined by the Secretary to be reasonably necessary because of the individual’s disability.section 2101 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: $28,000, in the case of an individual described in ; orsection 2101(a)(2) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: $5,000, in the case of an individual described in .section 2101(b)(2) of this title

Effective on October 1 of each year (beginning in 2012), the Secretary shall use the same percentage calculated pursuant to to increase the amounts described in paragraph (1) of this subsection.section 2102(e) of this title

children.heading: .—Limitation
children.label: c .—Limitation
children.text: The assistance authorized by subsection (a) shall be limited in the case of any individual to one residence.

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: d .—Regulations
children.text: Assistance under this section shall be provided in accordance with such regulations as the Secretary may prescribe.

children.heading: .—Termination
children.label: e .—Termination
children.text: No assistance may be provided under this section after .September 30, 2026
